channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [PANTH] Panth Infinity Ltd: FY26 Revenue ₹190.97 Lacs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Panth Infinity Ltd declares audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. Revenue from operations stood at ₹19097.05 Lacs, compared to ₹2997.37 Lacs in the previous year. The company reported a profit before tax of ₹1209.74 Lacs. The Board Meeting was held on May 13, 2026, where the results were approved.

  • Audited consolidated and standalone financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Revenue from Operations for FY26 is ₹19097.05 Lacs.
  • Profit before tax for FY26 is ₹1209.74 Lacs.
  • Auditor's Report with Unmodified Opinion received for FY26.
  • Board meeting commenced at 06:00 PM and concluded at 07:00 PM on May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Panth Infinity Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [XPROINDIA] Xpro India Board Meeting Scheduled for May 20, 2026
item.description:
Xpro India Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend a dividend, if any, on equity shares for the financial year ended on the same date.

  • Board meeting to approve audited financial results on May 20, 2026.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated results for FY26.
  • Board to consider recommending dividend for FY26.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: XPRO INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ANANTAM] Anantam Highways Trust Board to Meet on May 19, 2026
item.description:
Anantam Highways Trust announced that a board meeting is scheduled for May 19, 2026, to approve audited financial statements for the year ended March 31, 2026, consider the declaration of distribution to unitholders for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, and discuss the issuance of units on a preferential basis. The record date for distribution, if approved, is set for May 22, 2026. The trading window remains closed until 48 hours after the board meeting outcome.

  • Board to approve FY26 audited financial statements.
  • Declaration of distribution to unitholders to be considered.
  • Issuance of units on a preferential basis on the agenda.
  • Record date for distribution, if approved, is May 22, 2026.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hrs post board meeting outcome.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Anantam Highways Trust | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SEAMECLTD] Seamec Board Meeting Scheduled for May 18, 2026
item.description:
Seamec Ltd has announced that a meeting of the Board of Directors is scheduled for May 18, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend for the financial year 2025-26. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the results.

  • Seamec board to meet on May 18, 2026, for financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation for FY26 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed since April 1, 2026.
  • Trading window reopens 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SEAMEC LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MESON] Quest Flow Controls Changes Registered Office to Maharashtra
item.description:
Quest Flow Controls Ltd has shifted its registered office from Goa to Maharashtra, effective May 13, 2026. This change follows approval from the Regional Director, Western Region, Ministry of Corporate Affairs, and is registered by the Registrar of Companies, Pune. The new address is Gate No 324, Chakan MIDC Phase II, Village Bhamboli Tal, Dist. Khed, Chakan, Khed, Pune – 410501, Maharashtra, India. This disclosure complies with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Quest Flow Controls moves registered office from Goa to Maharashtra.
  • Change approved by Regional Director, Ministry of Corporate Affairs.
  • New registered office located in Chakan MIDC, Pune.
  • Effective date of change is May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Meson Valves India Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [ADORMUL] Thrive Future Habitats Invests in Subsidiary 1908 E-Ventures
item.description:
Thrive Future Habitats Ltd has invested in its subsidiary, 1908 E-Ventures Private Limited, acquiring 18,24,907 equity shares representing 30.31% of the paid-up share capital. The acquisition includes shares from related parties, with the transaction conducted on an arm's length basis. 1908 E-Ventures Private Limited's turnover was Nil and Net Loss was ₹(252.42) lakhs as of March 31, 2025. Post acquisition, Thrive Future Habitats aims to make 1908 EVPL a wholly owned subsidiary.

  • Thrive Future Habitats acquires 30.31% stake in 1908 E-Ventures Private Limited.
  • Acquisition includes shares from related parties on an arm's length basis.
  • 1908 E-Ventures Private Limited reported a Net Loss of ₹252.42 lakhs as of March 31, 2025.
  • Thrive Future Habitats intends to make 1908 EVPL a wholly owned subsidiary.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADOR MULTIPRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [TFCILTD] TFCI Reappoints Anoop Bali as MD for 2 Years
item.description:
Tourism Finance Corporation of India Ltd (TFCI) has reappointed Shri Anoop Bali as Managing Director for a further term of 2 years, effective from June 1, 2026, until May 31, 2028, subject to shareholder approval. He will also continue as CFO. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, recommended a dividend of ₹0.60 per share, and approved raising up to ₹1200 crore through various financial instruments. M/s C J] S Nanda & Associates were appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

  • Anoop Bali re-appointed as MD for 2 years, effective June 1, 2026.
  • Board recommends dividend of ₹0.60 per share (30%) for FY 2025-26.
  • Approved raising up to ₹1200 crore via loans/bonds/debentures.
  • M/s C J] S Nanda & Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.
  • Audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, approved.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TOURISM FINANCE CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OMFREIGHT] Om Freight Forwarders Appoints Company Secretary & Director
item.description:
Om Freight Forwarders Ltd's board meeting on May 13, 2026, approved the appointment of Ms. Manisha Kaur Saluja as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective immediately. Additionally, Mr. Keval M. Shah was appointed as an Additional Director, designated as a Non-Executive Independent Director for a 5-year term from May 13, 2026, to May 12, 2031. The board also approved the dissolution of the Risk Management Committee.

  • Manisha Kaur Saluja appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 13, 2026.
  • Keval M. Shah appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director for 5 years.
  • Risk Management Committee dissolved due to inapplicability of relevant SEBI regulations.
  • Board meeting commenced at 4:45 P.M. (IST) and concluded at 05:13 P.M. (IST).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Om Freight Forwarders Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RALLIS] Rallis India: KYC Details for Shareholders Holding Physical Shares
item.description:
Rallis India Ltd. has informed shareholders holding shares in physical form about the requirement to furnish KYC details as per SEBI regulations. The company has sent a letter to these shareholders and provided necessary forms on its website and the RTA's website (MUFG Intime India Private Limited). Shareholders are requested to update their PAN, address, mobile number, bank account details, and specimen signature. Failure to do so may result in dividends being paid only through electronic mode from April 1, 2024.

  • Rallis India informs shareholders about KYC update requirements.
  • KYC details include PAN, address, mobile number, and bank details.
  • Dividends will be paid electronically for non-updated accounts from April 1, 2024.
  • Forms are available on Rallis India and RTA (MUFG Intime) websites.
  • Submission can be done via in-person verification, hard copy, or e-sign.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RALLIS INDIA LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [THEINVEST] The Investment Trust of India Approves FY26 Audited Results
item.description:
The Investment Trust of India Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also considered the scheme of amalgamation of wholly-owned subsidiaries with the company and an update on the demerger scheme involving Distress Asset Specialist Limited.

  • Audited financial statements (consolidated and standalone) for FY26 approved.
  • Scheme of amalgamation of wholly-owned subsidiaries approved.
  • Update on the demerger scheme of The Investment Trust of India Limited into Distress Asset Specialist Limited considered.
  • Auditors issued an audit report with an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: The Investment Trust Of India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
